institution.name: University of North Carolina at Charlotte

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at University of North Carolina at Charlotte fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (1.7% → 0.0%).

flags.label: Public bachelor's-predominant peer
flags.summary: 10-year earnings at University of North Carolina at Charlotte are 26% above the public bachelor's-predominant peer median ($57.3k vs $45.3k).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at University of North Carolina at Charlotte rose 17% between 2021 and 2024 (42.8% → 50.1%).
